title: Fringe Academy Equity 101
company: local actor Carole Bremson, we are a vibrant community of professional performers and creative workers across theatre, film, television, radio, variety, and more. As part of the UK’s trade union for the performing arts and entertainment industry, we represent, support, and advocate for our members throughout Sussex. We host regular monthly meetings, events, workshops, and campaigns to strengthen our industry, promote fair working conditions, and build a supportive network for local talent. Whether you’re a seasoned professional or just starting out, we’re here to help you thrive. Come along and meet us to find out more about Equity and the work we do.
